name: F.A. Winners
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｆ．Ａ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フォーミュラアスリート</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ウィナーズ
desc: If you control a "F.A." monster, this card cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. When your "F.A." monster whose Level is at least 5 higher than its original Level battles an opponent's monster and inflicts battle damage to them: You can banish 1 card from your hand, field, or GY. You can only activate this effect of "F.A. Winners" once per turn. If 3 of your "F.A." Field Spells with different names are currently banished, and were all banished by the effect of "F.A. Winners", you win the Duel.
eff: If you control a "F.A." monster, this card cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. When your "F.A." monster whose Level is at least 5 higher than its original Level battles an opponent's monster and inflicts battle damage to them: You can banish 1 card from your hand, field, or GY. You can only activate this effect of "F.A. Winners" once per turn. If 3 of your "F.A." Field Spells with different names are currently banished, and were all banished by the effect of "F.A. Winners", you win the Duel.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
